creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 244511
Screenshot: Bug Access Denied (for 273425)

(In reply to Mark Linimon from comment #1)

Somewhat reluctantly, I have changed this to be (Nobody) …

Maybe nobody from a Bugzilla perspective, but from the public's point of view, it's, like: 

a) everybody; and 

b) close to everything. 

The screenshot here confirms that Bugzilla restrictions on 273425 do remain effective (at least, whilst the product in Bugzilla is 'Security'). However: 

* whilst kde@ is a CC recipient, all written comments will be 
  revealed to the public. 

<https://mail.kde.org/pipermail/kde-freebsd/2023-August/040443.html>, for example.
